case_title: ARASH SALKHI VS. ACE PLUMBING & ROUTER INC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACE PLUMBING & ROUTER INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-22-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ARASH SALKHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACE PLUMBING AND ROUTER INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN MILLINGTON. DEFENDANT REQUESTED AND PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT A CHANGE TO REVIEW THE PLAINTIFF'S ESTIMATES AND POSSIBLY REACH SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED NOV-05-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACE PLUMBING & ROUTER INC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SALKHI, ARASH AS TO DEFENDANT ACE PLUMBING & ROUTER INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JONATHAN MILLINGTON, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT ACE PLUMBING & ROUTER INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALKHI, ARASH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACE PLUMBING & ROUTER INC $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2025 VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ARASH SALKHI AND DEFENDANT ACE PLUMBING & ROUTER INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
